name: ephpm/wordpress-worker
description: Run WordPress under ePHPm persistent worker mode (boot-once, per-request reset).

ephpm.comment: The `repositories` VCS entry resolves ephpm/worker from its GitHub repo (tag v0.1.0) until it is registered on Packagist. Remove that entry once ephpm/worker is published to Packagist. WordPress worker mode REQUIRES `[php] worker_populate_superglobals = true` in ephpm.toml — see README.
